# Maison Lior

A luxury wedding planning atelier dedicated to crafting timeless celebrations, intimate gatherings, and destination weddings with refined elegance.

## Main Pages

* Home
  https://wedding-planner-web-app-virid.vercel.app/

* Atelier
  https://wedding-planner-web-app-virid.vercel.app/about

* Services
  https://wedding-planner-web-app-virid.vercel.app/services

* Portfolio
  https://wedding-planner-web-app-virid.vercel.app/portfolio

* Journal
  https://wedding-planner-web-app-virid.vercel.app/journal

* Contact
  https://wedding-planner-web-app-virid.vercel.app/contact

## Features

* Luxury wedding planning
* Bridal assistance
* Floral styling & décor curation
* Destination wedding coordination
* Venue sourcing & management
* Catering consultation
* Photography coordination
* Editorial-inspired portfolio gallery
* Wedding journal & planning insights
* Contact enquiry form

## Website

https://wedding-planner-web-app-virid.vercel.app
